fields.title: Restore tau lint gate oxlint availability
fields.description: Running `npm run gate` in `extensions/tau/` currently fails during `bun run lint` because `oxlint` is not found on PATH (`/run/current-system/sw/bin/bash: line 1: oxlint: command not found`). Typecheck passes before the lint step. This blocked validation of documentation-only skill updates.
fields.acceptance_criteria: `npm run gate` in `extensions/tau/` can resolve oxlint and proceeds past the lint step in a clean development environment.
